tool.name: EnzyWizard Mut Batch
tool.description: Run paired EnzyWizard workflows for wild-type and mutant proteins
tool.command: ln -s '$wt_cleaned_input_path' '$wt_cleaned_input_path.name' && ln -s '$mut_cleaned_input_path' '$mut_cleaned_input_path.name' && ln -s '$wt_input_msa' '$wt_input_msa.name' && ln -s '$mut_input_msa' '$mut_input_msa.name' && enzywizard-mut-batch -w '$wt_cleaned_input_path.name' -m '$mut_cleaned_input_path.name' -wm '$wt_input_msa.name' -mm '$mut_input_msa.name' -a '$cleaned_amino_acid_substitution' #if $advanced.substrate_names: -s '$advanced.substrate_names' #end if -wo wt_output -mo mut_output --hydrocluster_cutoff '$advanced.hydrocluster_cutoff' $advanced.energy.no_minimize_energy --energy_minimization_iteration '$advanced.energy.minimization_iteration' --flexibility_method '$advanced.flexibility.flexibility_method' --flexibility_cutoff '$advanced.flexibility.flexibility_cutoff' --flexibility_n_modes '$advanced.flexibility.flexibility_n_modes' --disorder_window_size '$advanced.disorder.disorder_window_size' --disorder_min_region_length '$advanced.disorder.disorder_min_region_length' --embedding_model_name '$advanced.embedding_model_name' --pocket_min_rad '$advanced.pocket.pocket_min_rad' --pocket_max_rad '$advanced.pocket.pocket_max_rad' --pocket_min_volume '$advanced.pocket.pocket_min_volume' --substrate_max_synonyms '$advanced.substrate.substrate_max_synonyms' --substrate_fp_radius '$advanced.substrate.substrate_fp_radius' --substrate_n_bits '$advanced.substrate.substrate_n_bits' --substrate_num_confs '$advanced.substrate.substrate_num_confs' --substrate_prune_rms '$advanced.substrate.substrate_prune_rms' --dock_max_attempt_num '$advanced.docking.dock_max_attempt_num' $advanced.docking.dock_no_early_stop --dock_exhaustiveness '$advanced.docking.dock_exhaustiveness' --dock_cpu "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1}" #if $advanced.docking.dock_catalytic_residue: --dock_catalytic_residue '$advanced.docking.dock_catalytic_residue' #end if #if $advanced.docking.dock_catalytic_site_coord: --dock_catalytic_site_coord '$advanced.docking.dock_catalytic_site_coord' #end if #if $advanced.docking.dock_box_size: --dock_box_size '$advanced.docking.dock_box_size' #end if --hbond_bonded_h_min_distance '$advanced.interaction.hbond_bonded_h_min_distance' --hbond_bonded_h_max_distance '$advanced.interaction.hbond_bonded_h_max_distance' --hbond_da_max_distance '$advanced.interaction.hbond_da_max_distance' --hbond_ha_max_distance '$advanced.interaction.hbond_ha_max_distance' --hbond_angle '$advanced.interaction.hbond_angle' --ionic_distance_cutoff '$advanced.interaction.ionic_distance_cutoff' --vdw_mu '$advanced.interaction.vdw_mu' --ppstack_center_distance_cutoff '$advanced.interaction.ppstack_center_distance_cutoff' --pication_distance_cutoff '$advanced.interaction.pication_distance_cutoff' --pication_angle_cutoff '$advanced.interaction.pication_angle_cutoff' --ssbond_max_distance '$advanced.interaction.ssbond_max_distance' > log.txt

param.label: Wild-type cleaned protein structure
param.help: Cleaned wild-type CIF or PDB structure

param.label: Mutant cleaned protein structure
param.help: Cleaned mutant CIF or PDB structure

param.label: Cleaned amino acid substitution
param.help: Cleaned amino acid substitution, e.g. A123V

tool.help:
**What it does**
EnzyWizard Mut Batch runs paired EnzyWizard workflows for a wild-type protein and a mutant protein, then produces mutation-aware integrated graph outputs. It supports protein-only comparison and, when substrates are provided, paired substrate preparation, docking, and protein-substrate interaction analysis.
**Inputs**
* **Wild-type cleaned protein structure** and **mutant cleaned protein structure**: cleaned CIF or PDB structures. * **Wild-type MSA** and **mutant MSA**: alignments matching the corresponding cleaned FASTA sequences. * **Cleaned amino acid substitution**: mutation label in cleaned residue numbering, normally from EnzyWizard Mut Clean. * **Optional substrate names or SMILES**: enables paired enzyme-substrate analysis. * **Advanced options**: module-specific controls shared with EnzyWizard Batch.
**Outputs**
* Wild-type output collection with integrated reports. * Mutant output collection with integrated reports. * Optional log file. * Optional intermediate files when **Save extra outputs** is enabled.
**Usage note**
Use this wrapper when the goal is direct wild-type versus mutant comparison. Use EnzyWizard Batch for a single protein workflow.
